club_knowledge_base.question: What are the opening hours?
club_knowledge_base.answer: The club is open from 9:00 AM to 10:00 PM Monday to Friday, and 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM on Saturday and Sunday.

club_knowledge_base.question: Is there a parking lot?
club_knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we have a free parking lot for members and guests.

club_knowledge_base.question: Do you offer private coaching?
club_knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we have several professional coaches available for private sessions. You can book them at the reception.

club_knowledge_base.question: Where is Torquay Tennis Club located?
club_knowledge_base.answer: We are located on Belgrave Road, Torquay, TQ2 5HP, just off the main seafront. We have on-site parking for members and visitors.

club_knowledge_base.question: What are the membership options and prices?
club_knowledge_base.answer: Our 2026 rates include: Full Adult (£359/year), Family (£659/year), and Under 25s (£139/year). New members who haven't joined in 5 years may qualify for the 'NEW' rate of £249.

club_knowledge_base.question: Do you offer Padel or Pickleball?
club_knowledge_base.answer: Yes! We have a Padel court (Members: £16/hr, Non-members: £24/hr) and dedicated Pickleball courts. We host regular social sessions and festivals for both.

club_knowledge_base.question: How do I book a tennis lesson?
club_knowledge_base.answer: You can book via Head Coach Steve Maslen 01803 209500. We offer 1-on-1s and group squads for all ages.

club_knowledge_base.question: Can non-members play?
club_knowledge_base.answer: Yes! You can use our 'Pay and Play' Tennis system via the LTA Rally platform or play as a guest for £10 (up to 3 visits) BATZ Member £5 for 2 hours.

club_knowledge_base.question: What are your court surfaces and lighting?
club_knowledge_base.answer: We have 9 outdoor courts (Artificial Clay/Tiger Turf) and 3 indoor Acrylic courts. Floodlights are available for evening play.
